title: spiraea × inflexa
intro: Spiraea × inflexa, also known as Steeplebush, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a cross between Spiraea salicifolia and Spiraea betulifolia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly for its diuretic and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve urinary tract issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Steeplebush include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Steeplebush can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers, leaves, and stems can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
